title: First CASE ATTACHED HERE!!
content:
Hello All --

Thank you for letting me know the first case was not in your pack. The bookstore has provided this link How VCs Evaluate Potential Venture Opportunities (conversation with 4 VCs) Links to an external site..

Apparently there was a RedShelf "mis launch", so thanks again for catching this and for letting me know. 

I look forward to working through the perspectives with you.
